steps.title: Use a doubling model
steps.content: The account starts at $940$ dollars and doubles every $12$ years. Doubling means multiplying by $2$ once every $12$ years.

steps.title: Write the exponent
steps.content: After $t$ years, the number of $12$-year periods is $$ \frac{t}{12} $$ So the model is $$ M(t)=940(2)^{\frac{t}{12}} $$ The answer is C.
